intent: Align cc-relayer visual UI and copy to ccsub.net target
Inspect target ccsub.net authenticated and public UI plus local cc-relayer route surfaces
Implement visual/copy alignment in Svelte frontend without changing broker core semantics
Document functional gaps left as visual placeholders
Verify local aligned UI with build and browser smoke

checks.name: default
checks.cmd: cd web && npm run build && npm run smoke

evidence_summary: Sampled ccsub.net public, login, and authenticated dashboard pages. Auth routes captured to /tmp/ccsub-reference/auth-pages.json and public routes to /tmp/ccsub-reference/public-pages.json.

Target UI sampled: public pages, login, dashboard shell, and authenticated customer pages. Stable visual rule is CCSub dark shadcn style with IBM Plex Sans, neon green primary, thin borders, cards, compact sidebar, and Chinese product copy.
Documented visual-only surfaces, partial alignments over existing data, and proper backend source-of-truth boundaries in docs/ccsub-visual-alignment-functional-gaps.md.

intent: Parallel rebuild target visual alignment from full ccsub.net inventory
Subagent: rebuild home page to target long-page structure
Subagent: align docs pages and docs child routes
Subagent: align authenticated customer app pages
Integrate subagent changes and verify complete target alignment

evidence_summary: Aligned pricing/models/blog/partner/contact/policies public pages; verification: npm --prefix web run build exit 0, forbidden target-brand scan no matches, local 5174 route probes ok.
Aligned authenticated app pages to target user-console structure; npm run build passed in web.
self-reviewed app route alignment; npm run build passed
Aligned docs shell and seven docs routes; verified no hardcoded target brand strings in web/src/routes/docs; npm run build passed from web/.
Docs pages aligned; npm run build passed; target brand hardcode scan clean.
home page subagent completed; integration fixed exact key-test phrase
